title: Maximum Length of Subarray With Positive Product
hints: Zeros split the array into independent segments; solve the problem for each segment separately and take the maximum result.
For a segment without zeros, the product sign depends only on the count of negative numbers. If the count is even, the whole segment is valid.
If the count of negatives is odd, you must exclude a prefix or suffix ending at a negative number to make the remaining count even. Which exclusion yields the longer subarray?
